task_completion.description: Verify the Project record is created with the correct Search Key, Name, and Organization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the iDempiere Project window, look for a record with Search Key 'WH-RENO-2024', Name 'Warehouse Renovation 2024', and Organization set to 'HQ'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Project header contains the correct dates, amount, and currency.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Project window, look for Date Contract '2024-07-01', Planned Finish Date '2025-01-31', Planned Amount '250,000.00', and Currency 'USD'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first project phase (Planning and Design) is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Project Phase tab/grid, look for a record with Seq '10', Name 'Planning and Design', Planned Amt '25,000', Start Date '2024-07-01', and End Date '2024-08-15'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second project phase (Demolition and Site Prep) is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Project Phase tab/grid, look for a record with Seq '20', Name 'Demolition and Site Prep', Planned Amt '45,000', Start Date '2024-08-16', and End Date '2024-09-30'.

task_completion.description: Verify the third project phase (Construction and Installation) is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Project Phase tab/grid, look for a record with Seq '30', Name 'Construction and Installation', Planned Amt '150,000', Start Date '2024-10-01', and End Date '2024-12-15'.

task_completion.description: Verify the fourth project phase (Final Inspection and Handover) is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Project Phase tab/grid, look for a record with Seq '40', Name 'Final Inspection and Handover', Planned Amt '30,000', Start Date '2024-12-16', and End Date '2025-01-31'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the iDempiere web GUI to create the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the iDempiere web interface (menus, tabs, fields) being actively used, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the records are actually entered into the application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data should be visible inside the standard iDempiere input fields or data grids, rather than pasted into a text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify the records appear to be saved in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for indicators that the record was saved, such as the 'Save' button being inactive/greyed out after clicking, a 'Record Saved' status message, or the phases appearing in the saved grid view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project Search Key: WH-RENO-2024. Project Name: Warehouse Renovation 2024. Total Planned Amount: 250,000 USD. Phase 1: Seq 10, Planning and Design, 25,000. Phase 2: Seq 20, Demolition and Site Prep, 45,000. Phase 3: Seq 30, Construction and Installation, 150,000. Phase 4: Seq 40, Final Inspection and Handover, 30,000.
